name: mcp-security-toolkit
description: Security scanner and developer toolkit for MCP servers used by AI agents.

scripts.scan:example:unsafe:expect-fail: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['./bin/mcp-sec.js', 'scan', './examples/unsafe-filesystem-mcp'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status === 2 ? 0 : 1);"
scripts.check: npm test && npm run scan:example:safe && npm run scan:example:unsafe:expect-fail

author: Naveen Ayalla
